vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #573

plan.title: prd:render: task -- --force silently no-ops because go-task cache layer wins before script --force reaches the code

narratives.Description: prd:render: task -- --force silently no-ops because go-task cache layer wins before script --force reaches the code
narratives.Problem: task prd:render -- --force silently skips with 'Task is up to date' because go-task's sources/generates cache shortcuts the task before CLI_ARGS reach the script. Operators following the #539 refuse-to-overwrite recovery hint hit a no-op dead-end. The actual recipe is task --force prd:render -- --force (two --force flags at two layers). Note: #574 (drop sources/generates from tasks/prd.yml) is already complete; this issue covers the message-update + audit follow-through.
narratives.Acceptance: Following the #539 refuse-to-overwrite error message's recovery hint actually causes PRD.md to be overwritten. Implementation can be: (a) update the #539 error string to spell out the double-force incantation, or (b) confirm the #574 fix already resolved the original repro and add a regression test. Audit other tasks/*.yml entries with sources/generates + script-level --force-like flags for the same class of issue. Add a regression test that reproduces the refuse-to-overwrite case, follows the message's recovery command literally, and asserts the file is overwritten.
narratives.OutOfScope: Removing the safety check from #539; renaming the script flag (would break consumer docs). New task-cache documentation file unless the audit surfaces a broader pattern.
narratives.Files: scripts/prd_render.py (#539 error message); tasks/prd.yml (already cleaned by #574 -- verify); other tasks/*.yml entries (audit); tests/cli/test_prd_render*.py (regression); CHANGELOG.md (append).

items.title: Verify #574 fix resolved the original repro; if not, update the #539 error string to the double-force incantation
Audit other tasks/*.yml entries for sources/generates + script --force pattern; document findings
Regression test: refuse-to-overwrite -> follow message recovery -> assert PRD.md overwritten
Optional: docs note about double-force semantics in scm/git.md or new docs/task-cache.md

references.title: Issue #573: prd:render: task -- --force silently no-ops because go-task cache layer wins before script --force reaches the code

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.
